title: Elemental Core
description: Elemental Core is a mod for the Elemental series that enhances the gameplay experience by introducing new minerals and essential crafting recipes, while also adding innovative features to enrich the Elemental series.
body:
# 📖 What's this mod?

Elemental Core is a mod for the Elemental series that enhances the gaming experience by introducing new minerals and essential crafting recipes, while also adding innovative features to enrich the Elemental series. This mod will also enable future mods, like Elemental Additions, to introduce armors, tools, and weapons, diversifying the content and gameplay. Additionally, it can be part of technical mods, providing a solid foundation for players who wish to explore more advanced and complex aspects of the game.

# 📦 Required
- Elemental Series Mod

# ✅ Features:

## New Natural Ores:

- Ruby
- Sapphire
- Lead
- Nickel
- Silver
- Tin
- Rose Quartz
- Fluorite

## New Alloy Ores:

- Bronze
- Arclite
- Steel
- Eternite
- Infernium
- Solarite
- Invar

## Other

- Additionally, the mod introduces gears, plates, and ore powders made from various materials, essential for crafting complex machinery.
